title: Infosys Foundation Announces Aarohan Social Innovation Awards 2025 Winners
detailed_summary: Infosys Foundation announced the winners of the fourth Aarohan Social Innovation Awards 2025, recognizing social innovations in education, healthcare, and environmental sustainability. Eight innovators received total prize money of INR 2 crore, including three category winners receiving INR 50 lakh each and five Jury's Special Award winners receiving INR 10 lakh each.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Foundation announced the winners of the fourth edition of the Aarohan Social Innovation Awards.
